steps.title: Use complementary angles
steps.content: In a right triangle, the two acute angles are complementary. The sine of one acute angle equals the cosine of its complementary angle.

steps.title: Match the trig values
steps.content: Since angles $A$ and $C$ are complementary, $$\sin C=\cos A$$ Given $\cos A=0.55$, it follows that $$\sin C=0.55$$ The answer is C.
